201.description: Pending registration saved. User/account/categories are created after email verification.

post.summary: Start registration and send an email verification code
Verify registration code and create the wallet account
Authenticate user and return a JWT token
Send a password reset code by email
Reset password using an email OTP code

get.summary: Get the signed-in user's account details
Get a QR code for receiving transfers into this account
List active categories for the current user

put.summary: Rename a category — protected names (Transfer In / Out) are blocked

delete.summary: Soft-delete a category — protected names (Transfer In / Out) are blocked

get.summary: List transactions with optional filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a manual transaction (income or expense). Expense is rejected if it would overdraw the account.

get.summary: Get a single transaction owned by the current user

put.summary: Update a manual transaction. Transfer-sourced transactions are immutable.

delete.summary: Delete a manual transaction and reverse its effect on the balance. Transfer-sourced transactions are immutable.

post.summary: Send money to another account (P2P). Atomic: balance check, paired transactions, and a notification to the receiver are all committed together or rolled back.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Filter by direction (omit to include both)

200.description: Array of transfer history items (newest first)

get.summary: List transfers where the current user is the sender, receiver, or both.
List the current user's notifications (newest first). Filter by isRead and paginate with page/limit.

put.summary: Mark all of the current user's notifications as read
Mark a single notification as read

get.summary: Get the current user's notification preferences

post.summary: Save (upsert) the current user's notification preferences
Send a test push to the current user's devices (dev/QA only — disabled in production unless PUSH_TEST_ENABLED=true)

get.summary: Income / expense / net savings for a specific month
Per-category breakdown for a given transaction type. Optional month/year (both-or-neither). Sorted by total descending.

parameters.name: months
parameters.description: Number of past months to include (current month included)

get.summary: Income vs expense across the last N months (current month included). Default 6, max 24.
Income vs expense bucketed by calendar week (1-7, 8-14, …) within a given month. Returns 4 or 5 buckets.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month (1–12). Must be supplied together with `year`.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year (e.g. 2026). Must be supplied together with `month`.

get.summary: Financial overview: current balance + income/expense totals. Supply month+year together to scope to a single month, or omit both for all-time.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of recent transactions to return

get.summary: Most recent transactions for the current user (newest first). Default limit 10, max 100.

post.summary: Register or refresh this device's FCM token for push notifications. Call on login and whenever Firebase issues a new token.
Remove this device's FCM token (call on logout) so it stops receiving the user's push notifications.

data.description: Response payload (null when there is no body)

message.example: Verification code sent to your email. Code expires in 10 minutes.

qrImageBase64.description: Base64-encoded PNG of the account-number QR code

refId.description: Transfer ID when source = transfer, otherwise null

newBalance.description: Account balance after applying this transaction

categoryId.description: Category ID — must belong to the user and match the transaction type

receiverAccountNumber.description: Receiver account number in format ACC-YYYYMMDD-NNNNN

direction.description: sent — current user is the sender; received — current user is the receiver

lowBalanceThreshold.description: Decimal stored as string for precise client-side handling

transferAlert.description: Receive a notification when a transfer is received

lowBalanceAlert.description: Receive an alert when balance falls below threshold

lowBalanceThreshold.description: Threshold (in account currency) below which the low-balance alert fires

total.description: Sum of amounts in this category

percentage.description: Share of grandTotal as a percentage (rounded to 1 decimal)

totalBalance.description: User's current account balance (lifetime, not period-scoped)

totalIncome.description: Sum of all income transactions in the period (or all-time if no period given). Includes transfer-in.

totalExpense.description: Sum of all expense transactions in the period (or all-time if no period given). Includes transfer-out.

period.description: Human-readable period label, or "All time" when no month/year is supplied

fcmToken.description: The FCM registration token issued to this device by Firebase
The FCM token to remove so this device stops receiving pushes
